channel.title: LLM on Krishna Raj
channel.description: Recent content in LLM on Krishna Raj

item.title: Understanding RAG Architecture
item.description:
🔹 What is RAG?

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) combines:

  • Retrieval of documents
  • LLM-based answer generation

🔹 Why use RAG?

  • Improves accuracy
  • Reduces hallucination
  • Uses real data

🔹 Simple Flow

User Question → Retrieve Docs → LLM → Answer

🔹 Conclusion

RAG is a powerful technique for building reliable AI systems.
